params.name: Artemis and the Stag
params.description: Artemis and the Stag is an ancient Roman bronze sculpture created in the 1st century BCE, depicting the goddess Artemis in hunting attire with a stag beside her, symbolizing her role as the protector of hunting and wildlife. This sculpture stands one meter tall and is almost perfectly preserved, making it a rare masterpiece of the classical era. The sculpture is not only acclaimed for its artistic value but also renowned for its performance in the auction market.
